title: Inverted VO2max Ladder
description: Hardest effort first, then sustain quality as intensity drops
purpose: Hardest first, sustain quality on fatigue

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Slow down. Yes, slower. Your aerobic system is thanking you right now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Low intensity, high volume. Building your engine from the ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Zone 2 is where fitness quietly accumulates. Trust it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: the pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you're on a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Endurance pace. Let your mind wander. Stay in zone.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 1 of 7.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 1/7 — hold 120% FTP at 85-100 rpm. Seated. 936s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First rep is always the hardest mentally. Once you're in it, commit.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep of the set. Be patient. Find the groove.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: The pain is temporary. The fitness is permanent. Don't you dare back off now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Target: 115% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Lock in and execute.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This interval is dedicated to whoever said 'it doesn't get easier, you just go faster.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep into the workout now. Stay present. One interval at a time.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-100 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5. Yes, it hurts. That's the price of being faster than yesterday.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 5/7 — hold 110% FTP at 85-100 rpm. Seated. 702s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 5 of 7 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The good news: you're almost done. The bad news: you still have 2 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost there. Keep the power smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 6/7. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 6. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. This is where you prove you're serious. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block. Hold power steady. 0s rest coming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain' (it doesn't, but it should).
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. Give it everything. Cooldown is coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 50% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 50%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.
